title: Goods 4 Me
lyrics: Are you good to you, are you good to you In the night, night, night, it comes I wake up, am I good to me? I got all the best advice, do I take it? Nah, not me, I wake up and I'm good to me That's a laughing fact and laughing stock of history Of my mind, inside my mind, I look back on the times I could've been there for me, but I wasn't Lost my shit, lost all my stuff, done drowning in emotions Don't, don't, don't, don't fit today A little single child occupancy inside my brain Makes me always wanna make the one to please To reach out to fix the hole to be there next to me I guess I stole it from the night inside of my mind I just know it's hard for me to be good to me So I'm asking you to help me try Be good to you, be good to me Be good to you, so you can be good to me Sometimes at night I see it lost, like a line inside my mind Where there was generosity and kind inside of minds Inside of eyes that I see on the street I see nothing but pain and ego Vortex curiosity of insane When I see lights, I see me, so be good to you When I see you, I see me, try to be good to me You see, golden rule way I'll be good to you, you be good to me I'll be good if you're good to me Lightning strikes only once in this life And from that spark becomes a different thing Embracing of all, we say Ten percent to change Have it be another way Ten percent to change Don't happen So be good to you, be good to me Be good to you, be good to me Be good enough to adjust to my frame To just say don't take the thing from the thing No violence here But let's play a puzzle game It's the show

lyricsSegments.text: Are you good to you, are you good to you In the night, night, night, it comes
I wake up, am I good to me?
I got all the best advice, do I take it?
Nah, not me, I wake up and I'm good to me
That's a laughing fact and laughing stock of history
Of my mind, inside my mind, I look back on the times
I could've been there for me, but I wasn't
Lost my shit, lost all my stuff, done drowning in emotions
Don't, don't, don't, don't fit today
A little single child occupancy inside my brain
Makes me always wanna make the one to please
To reach out to fix the hole to be there next to me
I guess I stole it from the night inside of my mind
I just know it's hard for me to be good to me
So I'm asking you to help me try
Be good to you, be good to me
Be good to you, so you can be good to me
Sometimes at night I see it lost, like a line inside my mind
Where there was generosity and kind inside of minds
Inside of eyes that I see on the street
I see nothing but pain and ego
Vortex curiosity of insane
When I see lights, I see me, so be good to you
When I see you, I see me, try to be good to me
You see, golden rule way
I'll be good to you, you be good to me
I'll be good if you're good to me
Lightning strikes only once in this life
And from that spark becomes a different thing
Embracing of all, we say
Ten percent to change
Have it be another way
Ten percent to change
Don't happen
So be good to you, be good to me
Be good to you, be good to me
Be good enough to adjust to my frame
To just say don't take the thing from the thing
No violence here
But let's play a puzzle game
It's the show
